raw_input:
[5.0/5] Feels clean My hair felt clean after using it. There is no smell and lathered really well. It's safe for colored hair and has no bad ingredients in it. [5.0/5] Fantastic Shampoo! Just Wonderful! This seriously has NO SCENT! They are not kidding around with the Fragrance Free on this bottle here! It truly smells like nothing! Not a hint of anything! Remarkable! This stuff lathers quickly and feels great!!! My hair and my scalp feel so clean! And, I love combining this with their Fragrance Free Conditioner! Amazing Product! Highly recommend! [4.0/5] nice it's nice but not that moisturizing but the conditioner that goes with this is awesome [3.0/5] Dislike it more than initially I’m revising my review and deducting a star. I’d already mentioned how CRAZY BAD this burns if it gets in your eyes, but it bears repeating. The new info here is that 2 of my household users get an itchy scalp after use. Maybe “diamond powder” as its 9th active ingredient isn’t such a fabulous idea??
* * * * * * * * * * * *
Ingredients: Aqua (Water/Eau), Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Cocamide MIPA, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Dioleate, Glycol Distearate, Diamond Powder, Emblica Officinalis Fruit Extract, Salvia Officinalis (Sage) Leaf Extract, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Extract, Hydrolyzed Quinoa, Brassica Campestris (Rapeseed) Seed Oil, Sesamum Indicum (Sesame) Seed Oil, Silicone Quaternium-16, Polyquaternium-7, Undeceth-11, Butyloctanol, Polyquaternium-10, Undeceth-5, Cinnamidopropyltrimonium Chloride, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates Copolymer, Disodium EDTA, Glycerin, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone.

I ended up liking this shampoo more than I thought I would. I took a spin around AIIR’s website, a brand I was previously unfamiliar with. Their lane is definitely upmarket holistic+New Age-y. (And those two words shouldn’t be mutually exclusive IMO). I’m personally not a big fan of hawking diamonds and crystals and other marketing hooks that aren’t scientifically proven to actually benefit hair. It jacks up the price point and borders upon gimmicky. However, finding truly fragrance-free shampoo is not an easy task… and this indeed is. And they are also Leaping Bunny certified, which I verified because I’m persnickety like that. Some small cruelty-free labels are still owned by a large parent company that isn’t Leaping Bunny certified, but AIIR is fully good to go. So high marks there.

The formula lathers a lot more than I expected. Here the Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate replaces the heavier sulfate that’s usually found in the first couple of ingredients; it’s a very mild surfactant, yet lathers quite well and rinses out easily. As a lot of newer generation brands are replacing now-vilified ingredients, I should note that the way we get Sodium Lauroyl Methyl Isethionate technically involves ethylene oxide— which is not without controversy. In 20 years it’ll also be replaced by something even better/safer. But for now, this is a very friendly cleanser option and my color-treated hair appreciates it.

My mom and have radically different hair types; she’s got thin, baby fine hair that needs body and I have thick, coarse, curls that I try hard to tame and de-volumize. Both of us didn’t have remarkable results after using this, but we did note our hair felt pretty soft. While I don’t know if I believe all of AIIR’s claims here about hair growth, I am impressed that the two of us could share a shampoo… as that’s something we can usually never do. This also preforms well in hard water.

I'm leaving it 4 stars because of how much it stung my eyes when some suds fell into them during my shower. And because of the diamond nonsense. You also don’t get a lot vs price point. But for gentle yet effective cleansing in a truly fragrance-free formula, yeah, not bad! Nice choice for a guest bathroom as this shouldn’t trigger many allergies, is gender neutral, and can work on all hair types.

This was a Vine item for me but unless I see some ‘wow’ factor pretty soon, once this is gone I don’t plan to buy any outright. [5.0/5] Love this shampoo I actually love that this is unscented. It cleans my hair really well also. It's not heavy or anything. Love using it with the conditioner. [5.0/5] Very nice shampoo This is a nice shampoo. It is odd not having a fragrance as I don’t believe I’ve ever used a shampoo that is fragrance-free, but there are benefits to this, such as helping prevent itchy scalp. I love the way the shampoo lathers my hair and leaves it feeling soft and clean.
Overall, this is a nice shampoo that provides a good clean, an excellent lather, and leaves my hair feeling and looking great once finished. [4.0/5] Left my hair Soft, Smooth & CLEANED⭐️👍 Like that this is Fragrance Free. A gentle shampoo that thoroughly cleans my hair. Usually shampoos that throughly clean away build up will strip my hair of the natural oils and this definitely does not. It is for “COLOR TREATED” hair.
I also use this shampoo in combination with [[ASIN:B09TQ29M5H AIIR Diamond Hair Conditioner]]. The combination of both together leaves my hair feeling cleaning, smooth and soft. No frizzing at all.
It is a bit pricey, however, for a professional brand product, is does as described, and they are all priced around the same for 8oz.

THOROUGHLY SEALED: ✅
One thing that is important to me is how manufacturers seal & ship their products. This was THOROUGHLY sealed as you can see from the pictures. 👍👍👍👍👍

DISCLAIMER:
📝Yes, I am a VINE 🗣VOICE member. EVERY product that I review was selected by ME & ONLY ME. The product or item is ALWAYS something that is needed and will be used in my Home🏡 & Yard 🌱🍃, or for my FAMILY 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦& Pets🦮🐾🐈‍⬛, or JUST FOR ME 💁🏻‍♀️. [4.0/5] Fragrance Free - Thank You! This 8 fl oz bottle of shampoo is just what I’m looking for. Not because it says it helps with hair growth or hair repair. I like this because it’s fragrance-free. I thank the maker for that! The shampoo comes in an easy to hold container. After wetting my hair in warm water, I squeezed a generous amount on my head. The shampoo lathers well and washes off easily, plus it makes my hair squeaky clean. I used a little hair conditioner before rinsing my hair again. I like how my hair feels soft and tangle free after drying off. The price, however would be expensive as an everyday shampoo. I see it more as a luxury shampoo which cleans and rinses well. [2.0/5] IT LEFT MY HAIR FEELING DRY & WEAKER I have tried this shampoo for about a week now and I wish I could say that I liked it, but I honestly can't. The shampoo feels smooth when I first wash it into my hair, but after I rinse the shampoo out, my hair feels really dry, instead of feeling soft, which I was really surprised after reading all the great reviews. Even though my hair is treated, I have always had thick and smooth hair but lately my hair hasn't been as strong as it used to be and I was hoping this shampoo would help. I do like the fact that it's a vegan formula and that its ingredients include quinoa and sage. But, unfortunately, I have not seen any benefits from using this product, if anything it left my hair feeling dry and weaker. And for what it sells for at $34.00 for a small 8 oz bottle, in my opinion, it's not worth it. [5.0/5] Great if you have allergies I have an allergy to scents and most shampoo. This works out great for me and my hair looks so much better. It has no scent. The bottle is very small and it’s pretty pricey but I gotta do what I gotta do [4.0/5] good shampoo This is a good shampoo. it is Fragrance free and does not have a scent. it left my hair and scalp feeling nice and clean. it suds up nicely and I feel like it cleanses really good. i think it would be great for anyone who is sensitive to scents. [4.0/5] Diamonds don't play a role, but my favorite shampoo these days... When I read the word "Diamond" at the front of this shampoo bottle, then of course I became curious to try it, but as far as I can tell, there's nothing that diamonds would do to benefit the hair, but I do see it listed as "Diamond Powder" on the ingredients list. The bottle actually looks kinda cheap, but it could be that this brand does not invest in fancy packaging, which will only increase the price of the product. This shampoo has no scent whatsoever, which I don't mind, less is more when it comes to products we use on our bodies/hair every day or almost every day. The liquid is completely clear and it lathers pretty good. But of all the shampoo's I've tried lately, I can say this is the one (when used with the same conditioner) that leaves my hair the best: soft, shiny, less frizz... it is only 8 fl oz and on the pricey side, but if you are curious like me, and need a change for your hair, give it a shot! [4.0/5] It's ok I have used a couple.of times the shampoo, as mentioned in the description it doesn't have smell and it does help your hair to be shiny. Now saying this I suffer from dry scalp and it have helped me with it (the cleansing part of the shampoo)
It's a good product but I don't think is worth 30 dollars a small bottle like this one [4.0/5] Not the best, not the worst It cleans your hair, but I’m not a huge fan of how it made my hair feel or how it smells. It didn’t make my hair soft like I like my shampoo to do. It had more of a squeaky clean feel so if you like that, then this is for you. :) [5.0/5] Nice Product, No smell This review is for AIIR Diamond Shampoo - Fragrance Free Shampoo - Shampoo for Color Treated Hair.

This shampoo cleanses superbly and softens nicely. I wish it wasn't fragrance free though. I personally like a little fragrance with my shampoo experience. I also love the way my hair smells afterwards. It's nice and it does clean well but I wish they'd consider making a similar product that's scented with jasmine or lavender. [1.0/5] Not sealed My bottle was received not sealed. It has a seal, but it was stuck to the top of the bottle, not the bottle itself. So the bottle of shampoo was not sealed, and if I want to use the squeeze top, I will have to somehow remove the seal that is stuck inside the top.

I was interested in trying this product because of the crystal infusion. I was curious to see how that effects the shampoo, but honestly, I'm skeptical. I carry crystals with me and do believe in the energy they have, but I don't know how that translates to a shampoo.

response:
Most reviewers say shampoo truly fragrance free, no scent at all. Hair feel clean, soft after use. Lather good. Safe color-treated hair. Work different hair types, even hard water. Pair well with matching conditioner.

Bad: bottle small, price high - 30-34 dollar for 8 oz. Some get itchy scalp, maybe from diamond powder ingredient. Burns bad if get in eyes. One reviewer hair feel dry, weaker after use. One bottle arrive not sealed.

Diamond powder ingredient - most think gimmick, no real hair benefit. Brand cruelty-free, Leaping Bunny certified. Good choice sensitive people, allergy sufferers.
